channel.name: 🕒・away-log
channel.topic:
If you need to be away from dming for a certain amount of time please include it in this chat to notify me and put a reason. If the reason is not valid then you will not be logged as away. If you dm me I will add it here as well. I will then react to the message so you know it has been seen.
✅  means it has been logged as away
❌ means it was not a valid reason and you will not be logged as away
